tagline: Family-Owned Pool Care You Can Trust

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Family-Level
Care
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool to relax, not to spend your weekends scrubbing tiles and testing chemicals. Tyler Pool Service handles every detail so you can just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> a Team That Knows You by Name
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full equipment overhauls, we handle it all. You get a dedicated technician who knows your pool inside and out.

cards.title: Weekly & Bi-Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and precise chemical balancing on a schedule that fits your life. Your pool stays swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems diagnosed and repaired quickly. We get your equipment running right the first time.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Professional leak detection to find and fix problems fast. Stop losing water and prevent costly structural damage to your pool.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing
cards.description: New plaster, updated tile, and fresh finishes that make your pool look brand new. Choose from a wide range of colors and textures.

cards.title: Pool Automation
cards.description: Control your pump, lights, heater, and water features from your phone. We install and configure smart pool systems for effortless operation.

cards.title: Water Features & Spa Service
cards.description: Fountains, spillovers, deck jets, and complete spa maintenance. Add beauty and relaxation to your backyard oasis.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll schedule a free inspection and give you an honest quote within 24 hours. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Your dedicated technician arrives on schedule with professional-grade products and advanced water chemistry knowledge. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment — all handled.

steps.title: Just Enjoy the Water
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and perfectly balanced. If something ever isn't right, one call to Cody and we make it right — that's the family business promise.

about.label: Why Tyler Families Trust Us
about.headline: We Treat Your Pool Like It's Our Own
about.description: Founded in 2015 by Cody, Tyler Pool Service is a family-owned company that treats every customer like family. Our technicians are thoroughly trained, well supervised, and use advanced water chemistry techniques to keep your pool in peak condition. With over a decade of loyal customers in East Texas, we've earned our reputation one backyard at a time.

features.title: Trained & Supervised Technicians
features.description: Every pool professional on our team is thoroughly trained and closely supervised to ensure top-quality work on every visit.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your trust every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees. Stay because you want to, not because you have to.

features.title: Above-and-Beyond Service
features.description: Need us before a party? Have a weekend emergency? We respond fast and go the extra mile because that's what family businesses do.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that works for your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no hassle.

guarantee.headline: Our "Family Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. We've been doing this for over a decade because we stand behind every single visit. Your satisfaction isn't just a policy — it's personal.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. If you have an urgent situation like a green pool or equipment failure, call us directly at (903) 871-9007 and we'll do our best to get to you sooner.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most of our customers provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll know exactly what was done after each visit, and you can always reach Cody directly with questions.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Tyler and the surrounding East Texas communities. If you're not sure whether you're in our service area, just give us a call and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: Do I have to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: Never. We don't believe in locking customers into contracts. You stay with us because you love the service, not because of fine print. Cancel anytime with zero fees or penalties.

faqs.question: Can you help with pool equipment repairs and upgrades?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle everything from pump and filter repairs to full automation system installations. We'll diagnose the issue, explain your options, and get it fixed right the first time.

testimonials.name: John B.
testimonials.text: We have been using Tyler Pool Service for the last 12 years. Their knowledge of pools and pool maintenance is top notch. They are very professional and reliable.

testimonials.name: Michael K.
testimonials.text: Cody went above and beyond for our pool repairs. He got to us quickly and had us back up and running in time for our party!

testimonials.name: Judy F.
testimonials.text: The best pool service!!! My pool is well taken care of, and if we ever have a problem or concern it is addressed and taken care of immediately.

contact.headline:
Ready for Pool Care That
Feels Like Family?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no gimmicks — just honest pool care from a local family who cares.
benefits: Free pool inspection with your quote
